message:
refactor(html-export): align CSS with Terminal Noir reference implementation

Update styles.rs to exactly match the Agent Flywheel globals.css reference
design system instead of the previous glassmorphism-based interpretation:

CSS Variable changes:
- Renamed --bg-void/deep/surface/elevated/hover to match reference naming
- Updated oklch color values to reference specification
- Changed text hierarchy variables (primary/secondary/muted/faint)
- Updated border colors and alpha values
- Refined accent color palette (cyan, amber, magenta, green, red, purple)
- Aligned role colors (user, assistant, tool, system)

Design philosophy shift:
- Removed glassmorphism-specific blur and glow effects
- Moved to cleaner, more minimal Terminal Noir aesthetic
- Better contrast ratios for accessibility
- Consistent with the production Agent Flywheel UI

This ensures the HTML export matches the visual language of the
main application, providing a cohesive user experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
